description: {"edges": "Irregular, slightly scalloped, with some areas of apparent insect feeding damage.", "veins": "Prominent, reticulate venation visible."} {"color": "Grayish-brown to dark brown, with potential for a halo effect.", "shape": "Irregular, somewhat circular to angular spots. Some lesions appear coalescing."} Symptoms are distributed across the leaf blade, with a higher concentration towards the lower portion and along the midrib. Not limited to vein areas.
